medical_history.history_of_present_illness: The patient is a male who presented with worsening hematuria. Admitted for treatment, Foley catheter placed, CBI started. Hematocrit levels dropped from 39.2 to 33.8 to 31. Urinalysis showed nitrite positive.

physical_examination.general_examination: WDWN, NAD, AVSS. Abdomen soft, non-distended, Foley in place, secured to medial thigh. Bilateral lower extremities without edema, pitting or pain to deep palpation of calves.
